name: Google Slides
description: Google's collaborative online presentation editor for creating and sharing slide decks in real time.

years.notes: Skeuomorphic yellow presentation page with folded top-right corner and a white slide frame containing horizontal text bars (2014–2020). Redrawn into a 24×24 viewBox (translate(3.2727 0) scale(0.36364) from the native 48×66 source); decorative gradients and bottom-edge shadow overlays from the upstream Sketch export were dropped for clarity at icon size.

Current Workspace-era mark introduced October 6, 2020. Flat geometric yellow page with a separate orange folded-corner flap and an off-white slide frame containing a single horizontal text bar. Redrawn into a 24×24 viewBox (translate(3.2727 0) scale(0.27273) from the native 64×88 source).

2026 Workspace refresh — rounded landscape page with a vertical yellow→light-yellow body gradient, a top yellow stack-edge tab and a soft yellow→pink shadow strip beneath, plus a centered white slide frame stroke. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the community Figma file 'New Google Workspace Icons 2026' (node 1:241), exported via the Figma Desktop Bridge as SVG_STRING.
